target.transportPath: WCMP-C-001 plus the general WCMP message-structure alternative WCMP-SP-C-002 and its three dependency rows. The RFC ICMP alternative remains capability-declared but unselected.

governingSource.selectedDefinition: MCF = all mandatory client features of the specification SCR
governingSource.dependencyGrammar: SCR requirement expressions use AND/OR with AND taking precedence

authority.extractionMethod: Row identifiers, first-line feature labels, status, actor, order, and dependency expressions were parsed from the hash-locked effective SCR table text. Private PDFs and full text remain outside Git.

mapping.assessmentNote: No WCMP or ICMP implementation exists in transport-rust; the selected general-WCMP dependency path has no codec, state, or executable fixtures.
Preserved for source completeness; implementation is assessed when its optional, server, bearer, or alternate-mode capability is selected.
